tasks.label: SF: Sync ← Org (absorb enrichment, get to 0/0)
tasks.detail: Strip trailing newlines, then retrieve with --ignore-conflicts. Run after every deploy.
tasks.command: node scripts/strip-trailing-newlines.js && sf project retrieve start -o certgame --ignore-conflicts

tasks.label: SF: Deploy → Org
tasks.detail: Deploy force-app to the certgame scratch org.
tasks.command: sf project deploy start -o certgame -d force-app -w 30

tasks.label: SF: Deploy → Org (then Sync)
tasks.detail: Deploy local changes and immediately retrieve to absorb any server enrichment.
tasks.command: sf project deploy start -o certgame -d force-app -w 30 && node scripts/strip-trailing-newlines.js && sf project retrieve start -o certgame --ignore-conflicts

tasks.label: SF: Preview Deploy (local → org drift)
tasks.detail: Shows what would be deployed if you pushed now.

tasks.label: SF: Preview Retrieve (org → local drift)
tasks.detail: Shows what the org has that local doesn't. This is what the VS Code footer indicator counts.

tasks.label: SF: Tail Apex Log
tasks.detail: Stream debug logs while exercising Slack/web flows.

tasks.label: SF: Run Apex Tests (RunLocalTests)
tasks.detail: Full org test run with code coverage.
tasks.command: sf apex run test -o certgame -l RunLocalTests -w 60 -c -r human

tasks.label: SF: Run One Apex Test Class
tasks.detail: Prompts for a class name and runs that one.
tasks.command: sf apex run test -o certgame -n ${input:apexClassName} -r human -w 20 --code-coverage

tasks.label: Prettier: Write + Strip Newlines
tasks.detail: Format then strip trailing newlines so the result matches the org's canonical form.

tasks.label: SF: Strip Trailing Newlines (only)
tasks.detail: Idempotent. Run if drift creeps back from a non-prettier writer.

tasks.label: SF: Drift Report (typed counts)
tasks.detail: Counts remote drift grouped by metadata type. Cheap diagnostic.
tasks.command: sf project retrieve preview -o certgame --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; from collections import Counter; d=json.load(sys.stdin); files=d['result'].get('toRetrieve',[]); print('Total remote drift:', len(files)); [print(f'  {n:>4} {t}') for t,n in Counter(f['type'] for f in files).most_common()]"

tasks.label: SF: Validate Question Pack JSON
tasks.detail: Prompts for a sample_data pack path and validates against the contract.

tasks.label: SF: Reset Source Tracking (nuclear)
tasks.detail: Clears local and remote tracking state. Next deploy/retrieve treats current state as canonical. Use only when tracking is corrupted.

tasks.label: SF: Bootstrap Scratch Org (destructive)
tasks.detail: Creates a fresh certgame scratch org, deploys, assigns the permset group. Replaces any existing org by that alias.
tasks.command: sf org create scratch -f config/project-scratch-def.json -a certgame -d -y 30 && sf project deploy start -o certgame -w 30 && sf org assign permsetgroup -n Cert_Game_All_Admin -o certgame
